mapper.sql: role_id, organization_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO organization_role ( role_id, organization_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{roleId}, #{organizationId}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDt}, NOW()), #{chgId}, COALESCE(#{chgDt}, NOW()) #{delYn} )

INSERT INTO organization_role ( role_id, organization_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{organizationRole.roleId}, #{organizationRole.organizationId}, #{organizationRole.regId}, COALESCE(#{organizationRole.regDt}, NOW()), #{organizationRole.chgId}, COALESCE(#{organizationRole.chgDt}, NOW()), #{organizationRole.delYn} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM organization_role WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM organization_role WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} AND role_id = #{roleId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM organization_role WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} AND role_id = #{roleId}

DELETE FROM organization_role WHERE (organization_id, role_id) IN
#{orgRole.organizationId}, #{orgRole.roleId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ors.organization_id, ors.role_id, ors.reg_id, ors.reg_dt, ors.chg_id, ors.chg_dt, ors.del_id, ors.del_dt, ors.del_yn FROM organization_role ors INNER JOIN organization o ON ors.organization_id = o.organization_id INNER JOIN role r ON ors.role_id = r.role_id WHERE (ors.organization_id, ors.role_id) IN
(#{organizationRole.organizationId}, #{organizationRole.roleId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE organization_role SET del_yn = CASE
WHEN (organization_id = #{organizationRole.organizationId} AND role_id = #{organizationRole.roleId}) THEN #{organizationRole.delYn}
ELSE del_yn END, chg_id = CASE
WHEN (organization_id = #{organizationRole.organizationId} AND role_id = #{organizationRole.roleId}) THEN #{organizationRole.chgId}
ELSE chg_id END, chg_dt = CASE
WHEN (organization_id = #{organizationRole.organizationId} AND role_id = #{organizationRole.roleId}) THEN COALESCE(#{organizationRole.chgDt}, NOW())
ELSE chg_dt END, del_id = CASE
WHEN (organization_id = #{organizationRole.organizationId} AND role_id = #{organizationRole.roleId}) THEN #{organizationRole.delId}
ELSE del_id END, del_dt = CASE
WHEN (organization_id = #{organizationRole.organizationId} AND role_id = #{organizationRole.roleId}) THEN COALESCE(#{organizationRole.delDt}, NOW())
ELSE del_dt END WHERE (organization_id, role_id) IN
(#{organizationRole.organizationId}, #{organizationRole.roleId})
